special_offer.duration: Permanent — locks in for life of contract if signed before expiry date
special_offer.applies_when: Time-limited promotional offer, applied based on lead situation and timing

what_is_included: Listing management on Airbnb and Booking.com
Linen and towel supply and laundry
Damage reporting and insurance claim assistance
what_is_not_included: Maintenance work costs (at cost, no markup from Stayful)

competitor_fee_context.note: Some competitors charge 18-20% + add-on fees (software, photography, onboarding). Compare total cost of management, not headline percentage.
